result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "移除 context manager 與 exception handling，導致檔案洩漏與批次崩潰", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "correctness", "file": "pipeline/ingest.py", "line_hint": "L18", "check": "f = open(...) 沒有 with 包覆，沒有 try/except", "verdict": "任何 IOError 或 json.JSONDecodeError 都會讓整個 process_batch 拋出未捕獲例外，中斷所有後續檔案處理；即使成功，f 也不會被明確關閉（依賴 GC），大批次下會耗盡檔案描述符", "fix": "還原 with open(...) as f: + except (IOError, json.JSONDecodeError) 的結構，或至少加 try/finally: f.close()"}]}
